sources.headline: Destin Daniel Cretton Believes Secrecy Around Sadie Sink’s Role Makes ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ a Better Movie
sources.summary: Five few years ago, Tobey Maguire and Andrew Garfield were kept out of the marketing for 'No Way Home.' Marvel and Sony are somewhat repeating that playbook for the 'Stranger Things' star's mystery part.

sources.summary: Zosia Mamet has joined the upcoming fifth season of Industry at HBO, Variety has learned. As previously announced, Season 5 of the British finance industry drama will be its last.
